prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document applies to England as it involves an application for an environmental permit under the Environmental Permitting (England and Wales) Regulations 2016. The Environment Agency, which manages these regulations, operates in England, and the specific permit application relates to a facility located in England.
